name: @cobdfamily/clam-app-generator
description: Generates iOS/Android Capacitor apps from one shared web base plus a tiny per-app overlay. Native projects are disposable, regenerated from a pinned Capacitor version each build (approach D).

scripts.pretest: npm run build -w @cobdfamily/cobdcorekit && npm run build -w @cobdfamily/cobd-apps-grid
